title: news.raw
description: A raw news item produced by the Go ingestion service to the Kafka topic `news.raw`. This is the entry point of the pipeline; nothing has been deduped, normalized, or scored yet. Model output (sentiment/entities) must NEVER appear on this message.

schema_version.description: Contract version. Bump on any breaking change so both languages fail loudly on mismatch.

id.description: Stable unique id for the item (source GUID or a deterministic hash). Used as the Kafka message key for partitioning.

source.description: Where the item came from. `replay` is the offline default.

feed.description: Optional feed name or identifier within the source (e.g. an RSS feed title).

url.description: Optional canonical URL of the item.

title.description: Headline text as received from the source (unnormalized).

body.description: Article body or summary text as received from the source (unnormalized).

published_at.description: Original publish time from the source (RFC 3339 / ISO 8601, UTC).

ingested_at.description: Time the Go ingestion service produced this item to Kafka (RFC 3339, UTC).

tickers.description: Optional ticker hints supplied by the source or replay dataset. These are NOT model output; entity extraction happens later in the Python inference layer.
